description_long: This is a compact, modern rifle with a matte black finish and a prominent cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel. The rifle features a detachable box magazine inserted into the lower receiver, and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. A simple, low-profile iron sight is mounted along the top rail, and a brown sling is looped over the body for easy carrying. The overall design is streamlined, with minimal external attachments aside from the suppressor and sling. The construction appears to be primarily metal, with polymer components for the grip and stock.
description: A compact black rifle with a suppressor, detachable magazine, pistol grip, and brown sling, featuring a streamlined modern design.
description_view_0: The rifle is viewed directly from the front, showing the circular opening of the suppressor and a narrow profile.
description_view_1: A clear side view reveals the full length of the suppressor, the detachable magazine, pistol grip, and brown sling draped over the body.
description_view_2: The rifle is seen from the rear, highlighting the back of the receiver, the magazine, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the suppressor, magazine, grip, and sling, mirroring the features seen in view 1.
